hook_3s: Many 'body-safe' labels can be misleading. Here's how to truly understand them.
script_voiceover: Many 'body-safe' labels can be misleading. Here's how to truly understand them. When choosing wellness products, look for terms like 'medical-grade silicone' or 'FDA-grade silicone' to ensure non-porosity and safety. Avoid products labeled only as 'jelly' or 'TPR,' as these often contain phthalates and can harbor bacteria. Always check for 'phthalate-free' certification. Your well-being is paramount. For a deeper dive into body-safe materials, explore our guide linked in bio. Share your thoughts on labels in the comments!
